history.content: The application should consist of a public web form accessible at a web address without requiring login. Anyone can submit a request by filling in their name, surname, email (required), phone number, a text describing their request (required), and an optional file attachment. After submission, a registration desk employee reviews the incoming request and decides whether it should be routed to the Legal department or directly to the PR department. If routed to Legal, a lawyer must write a formal statement (required field) before the case moves on to PR. When the request arrives at the PR department, the PR employee can see the original request, the lawyer's statement if one was written, and must write a polite answer to the submitter. At all times the submitter should have a persistent status view at a web address where they can see the current status of their request and, once available, the final answer.

This application is a public eForm for submitting requests, with a workflow that routes submissions through a registration desk, optionally to Legal, and then to PR for a final answer. The submitter can always view the status and final answer via a persistent status view. The design uses an anonymous role for the public form, explicit roles for Registration, Legal, and PR, and a detail view task accessible to the submitter at all times.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>public_request</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>PRQ</initials>
  <title>Public Request Submission</title>
  <icon>assignment</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>true</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

  <role><id>registration</id><title>Registration Desk</title></role>
  <role><id>legal</id><title>Legal</title></role>
  <role><id>pr</id><title>PR</title></role>
  <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

  <data type="text">
    <id>name</id><title>Name</title><init></init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>surname</id><title>Surname</title><init></init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>email</id><title>Email</title><init></init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>phone</id><title>Phone Number</title><init></init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>request_text</id><title>Request Description</title><init></init>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="file">
    <id>attachment</id><title>Attachment</title>
    <component><name>preview</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>route</id>
    <title>Route To</title>
    <options>
      <option key="legal">Legal</option>
      <option key="pr">PR</option>
    </options>
    <init></init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>to_legal</id><title>To Legal</title><init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>to_pr</id><title>To PR</title><init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>legal_statement</id><title>Lawyer Statement</title><init></init>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>pr_answer</id><title>PR Answer</title><init></init>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>status</id><title>Status</title><init>Submitted</init>
  </data>

  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>detail_ref</id><title>Status View</title><init>detail_view</init>
  </data>

  <transition>
    <id>submit_request</id><x>208</x><y>208</y><label>Submit Request</label>
    <icon>send</icon><assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy><priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>anonymous</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>submit_group</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Submit Request</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>name</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>surname</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>preview</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>submit_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="1"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status;
          change status value { "Submitted" };
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>registration_review</id><x>400</x><y>208</y><label>Registration Review</label>
    <icon>how_to_reg</icon><assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy><priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>registration</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>reg_group</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Review Request</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>surname</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>preview</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>route</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>reg_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="2"><![CDATA[
          to_legal: f.to_legal, to_pr: f.to_pr, route: f.route, status: f.status;
          if (route.value == "legal") {
            change to_legal value { 1 }; change to_pr value { 0 };
            change status value { "Sent to Legal" };
          } else {
            change to_legal value { 0 }; change to_pr value { 1 };
            change status value { "Sent to PR" };
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>legal_statement_task</id><x>592</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Statement</label>
    <icon>gavel</icon><assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy><priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>legal</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>legal_group</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Legal Statement</title>
      <dataRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>

        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>legal_statement</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>legal_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="3"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status;
          change status value { "Legal Statement Provided" };
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>pr_answer_task</id><x>784</x><y>208</y><label>PR Answer</label>
    <icon>record_voice_over</icon><assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy><priority>1</priority>

        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

      <dataRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

        <component><name>preview</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>legal_statement</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</x><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
```

importing this xml i got this: XML parsing error at line 83 column 33

Thank you for reporting the error. Line 83, column 33 points to a specific spot, but since line numbers can shift, the most common causes for XML parsing errors in Petriflow are:

- Use of special characters (`&`, `<`, `>`) in text content (C6)
- Incorrect `<component>` tag structure (C8)
- Typo in XML structure (e.g., `<x>`/`<y>` swapped, missing closing tag)
- Duplicate or misplaced tags
- Invalid attribute or tag in Petriflow schema

### Let's check your XML for these issues:

#### 1. **Component Tag Structure**
You have:
```xml
<component><name>textarea</name></component>
```
This is correct (C8).

#### 2. **Special Characters**
Check for `&`, `<`, `>` in `<title>`, `<label>`, `<option>`, etc.  
I see none in your provided XML.

#### 3. **Layout Tag Structure**
I see lines like:
```xml
<layout><x>1</x><y>0</x><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
```
**Problem:**  
`<y>0</x>` should be `<y>0</y>`.  
This typo is present in several places and will cause a parsing error.

#### 4. **Other Common Issues**
- Only one `<dataGroup>` per transition (OK)
- No `<caseEvents>` block (OK for this process)
- All roles, data fields, and transitions are declared (OK)

---

### **How to Fix**

**Replace every instance of `<y>0</x>` with `<y>0</y>`.**  
Do the same for any other `<y>` tags that are incorrectly closed.

---

### **Summary of Questions**

1. **Do you want me to regenerate the corrected XML with all `<y>` tags fixed?**
2. **Do you want any other changes (e.g., field order, labels, or additional logic)?**

Let me know if you want the fixed XML, or if you have other requirements!

The application consists of two separate processes: Order and Invoice.

Order process — internal, authenticated users only. A user creates an order by filling in a subject (required), supplier name (required), order date (required), and notes. After submission, a manager reviews and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. If rejected, the order loops back to the submitter for correction and resubmission. If approved, the order moves to an open state where it waits for invoices — this task must stay permanently open so invoices can be linked at any time. The order has a persistent status view showing current state, manager comment, and all linked invoices embedded inline via a taskRef panel.

Invoice process — internal, authenticated users only. A user registers an invoice by filling in invoice number (required), amount (required), invoice date (required), and uploading the invoice file (required). The invoice must be linked to an existing order — this is done via a caseRef or enumeration_map field dynamically populated with approved orders. After the invoice is registered, the order it belongs to is automatically notified: a system action in the invoice process finds the linked order case and sets a field on it to trigger a refresh of the embedded invoice panel. The invoice then waits for approval. The order owner reviews all linked invoices from within the order's permanent task and approves or rejects each one individually.

Both processes are completely independent namespaces — roles, fields and transitions must be declared separately in each process XML. Cross-process communication happens only through action code using findCase, setData, assignTask, and finishTask.

I have designed a two-process system using the **IPC-0 pattern** for reliable cross-process task embedding. 

The **Order** process features a state machine that loops on rejection and moves to a "Permanent Open" state upon approval. This state hosts a `taskRef` field that dynamically displays invoice approval forms from the **Invoice** process.

The **Invoice** process allows users to select an approved Order. Upon registration, a system action uses `setData` to update the Order case, appending the new Invoice's approval task ID to the Order's display panel.

### Clarifying Questions
### 1. Roles and Access
1. Should the **Order Submitter** and the **Invoice Registrant** be the same role, or are these distinct groups of users?
2. Does the **Manager** who approves the Order also need to approve the individual **Invoices**, or is that handled by the Order Submitter (Owner)?

### 2. Data and Logic
3. For the **Order Date** and **Invoice Date**, should we restrict these to be "today or earlier," or is future dating allowed?
4. When an Invoice is rejected, should it also loop back for correction (like the Order), or is it simply marked as "Rejected" and terminated?
5. You mentioned a "Manager Comment" for the Order. Should this comment be overwritten on every loop, or should we maintain a history/log of comments?

### 3. Integration
6. For the **Order Selection** in the Invoice process: should the list show only the Order Subject, or a combination of "ID - Subject - Supplier" to help the user identify the correct one?
7. Is there a specific file type or size limit for the **Invoice File** upload?

I will build a two-process system using the **IPC-0 pattern** for cross-process task embedding. The **Order** process includes a loop for manager rejection and a permanently open "Order Dashboard" task that uses a `taskRef` to embed invoice approvals. The **Invoice** process dynamically fetches approved orders, and upon submission, a system action uses `setData` to "push" the invoice's approval task ID into the parent Order's dashboard for immediate visibility.

### Order Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>order_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>ORD</initials>
    <title>Order Management</title>
    <icon>shopping_cart</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

    <caseEvents>
        <event type="create">
            <id>order_create</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="1"><![CDATA[
                    changeCaseProperty("title").about { "New Order" }
                    changeCaseProperty("color").about { "blue" }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </caseEvents>

    <role><id>submitter</id><title>Submitter</title></role>
    <role><id>manager</id><title>Manager</title></role>
    <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

    <data type="text">
        <id>subject</id>
        <title>Subject</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>supplier</id>
        <title>Supplier Name</title>
    </data>
    <data type="date">
        <id>order_date</id>
        <title>Order Date</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>notes</id>
        <title>Notes</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <title>Manager Comment</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>decision</id>
        <title>Manager Decision</title>
        <options>
            <option key="approve">Approve</option>
            <option key="reject">Reject</option>
        </options>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_approve</id>
        <title>Go Approve</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_reject</id>
        <title>Go Reject</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="taskRef">
        <id>linked_invoices</id>
        <title>Linked Invoices</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>status</id>
        <title>Current Status</title>
        <init>Draft</init>
    </data>

    <transition>
        <id>submit</id>
        <x>208</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Submit Order</label>
        <icon>send</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>submitter</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_submit</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Order Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>supplier</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>notes</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>sub_fin</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="2"><![CDATA[
                    status: f.status, subject: f.subject;
                    change status value { "Pending Approval" }
                    changeCaseProperty("title").about { subject.value }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>review</id>
        <x>400</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Manager Review</label>
        <icon>rate_review</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>manager</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_review</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Review Decision</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>decision</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>manager_comment</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>rev_fin</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="3"><![CDATA[
                    dec: f.decision, comm: f.manager_comment, go_app: f.go_approve, go_rej: f.go_reject, status: f.status;
                    if (dec.value == "approve") {
                        change go_app value { 1 }; change go_rej value { 0 }
                        change status value { "Approved" }
                        changeCaseProperty("color").about { "green" }
                    } else {
                        if (!comm.value) throw new java.lang.IllegalStateException("Comment is required for rejection")
                        change go_app value { 0 }; change go_rej value { 1 }
                        change status value { "Rejected - Needs Correction" }
                        changeCaseProperty("color").about { "orange" }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>

        <x>784</x>
        <y>16</y>

            <dataRef>
                <id>manager_comment</id>

            </dataRef>

                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>

        </dataGroup>
```

### Invoice Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>invoice_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>INV</initials>
    <title>Invoice Registration</title>
    <icon>receipt</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

    <role><id>registrant</id><title>Registrant</title></role>
    <role><id>approver</id><title>Approver</title></role>
    <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

    <data type="text"><id>inv_number</id><title>Invoice Number</title></data>
    <data type="number"><id>amount</id><title>Amount</title></data>
    <data type="date"><id>inv_date</id><title>Invoice Date</title></data>
    <data type="file"><id>inv_file</id><title>Invoice File</title></data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>order_ref</id>
        <title>Select Order</title>
    </data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>inv_decision</id>
        <title>Invoice Decision</title>
        <options>
            <option key="approve">Approve</option>
            <option key="reject">Reject</option>
        </options>
    </data>

    <transition>
        <id>register</id>
        <x>208</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Register Invoice</label>
        <icon>add_circle</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>registrant</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_reg</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_ref</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_number</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>amount</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_file</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="assign">
            <id>reg_ass</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="4"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    def orders = findCases { it.processIdentifier.eq("order_process") }
                        .findAll { c -> (c.activePlaces?.get("p_dash") ?: 0) > 0 }
                        .collectEntries { [(it.stringId): it.title] }
                    change order_ref options { orders }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>reg_fin</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="5"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    async.run {
                        def parentCase = findCase { it._id.eq(order_ref.value) }
                        if (parentCase) {
                            def myTask = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("approve_invoice").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
                            if (myTask) {
                                def currentList = parentCase.dataSet?.get("linked_invoices")?.value ?: []
                                setData("order_dashboard", parentCase, [
                                    "linked_invoices": ["value": currentList + myTask.stringId, "type": "taskRef"]
                                ])
                            }
                        }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>approve_invoice</id>
        <x>592</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Approve Invoice</label>
        <icon>check_circle</icon>
        <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_inv_app</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Approval</title>
            <dataRef><id>inv_number</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>amount</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_file</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_decision</id><logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
    </transition>

    <place><id>p_start</id><x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_wait</id><x>400</x><y>208</y><label>Waiting</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

    <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId><destinationId>register</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>register</sourceId><destinationId>p_wait</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_wait</sourceId><destinationId>approve_invoice</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```
je tam nejake cudne miesto ktore nie je na nic napojene a sme v etask treba pouzit workspace

Opravil som XML štruktúru oboch procesov. V procese **Order** som odstránil nadbytočné miesto a opravil tok tak, aby po schválení manažérom prešiel token priamo do stavu `p_dash`, ktorý cez `read` arc aktivuje permanentný dashboard. V procese **Invoice** som pridal prefix `workspace +` k identifikátorom procesov v Groovy kóde, čo je nevyhnutné pre správne fungovanie v prostredí **eTask**.

### Order Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>order_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>ORD</initials>
    <title>Order Management</title>
    <icon>shopping_cart</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

    <caseEvents>
        <event type="create">
            <id>order_create</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="1"><![CDATA[
                    changeCaseProperty("title").about { "New Order" }
                    changeCaseProperty("color").about { "blue" }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </caseEvents>

    <role><id>submitter</id><title>Submitter</title></role>
    <role><id>manager</id><title>Manager</title></role>
    <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

    <data type="text">
        <id>subject</id>
        <title>Subject</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>supplier</id>
        <title>Supplier Name</title>
    </data>
    <data type="date">
        <id>order_date</id>
        <title>Order Date</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>notes</id>
        <title>Notes</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <title>Manager Comment</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>decision</id>
        <title>Manager Decision</title>
        <options>
            <option key="approve">Approve</option>
            <option key="reject">Reject</option>
        </options>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_approve</id>
        <title>Go Approve</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_reject</id>
        <title>Go Reject</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="taskRef">
        <id>linked_invoices</id>
        <title>Linked Invoices</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>status</id>
        <title>Current Status</title>
        <init>Draft</init>
    </data>

    <transition>
        <id>submit</id>
        <x>208</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Submit Order</label>
        <icon>send</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>submitter</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_submit</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Order Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>supplier</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>notes</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>sub_fin</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="2"><![CDATA[
                    status: f.status, subject: f.subject;
                    change status value { "Pending Approval" }
                    changeCaseProperty("title").about { subject.value }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>review</id>
        <x>400</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Manager Review</label>
        <icon>rate_review</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>manager</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_review</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Review Decision</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>decision</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>manager_comment</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>rev_fin</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="3"><![CDATA[
                    dec: f.decision, comm: f.manager_comment, go_app: f.go_approve, go_rej: f.go_reject, status: f.status;
                    if (dec.value == "approve") {
                        change go_app value { 1 }; change go_rej value { 0 }
                        change status value { "Approved" }
                        changeCaseProperty("color").about { "green" }
                    } else {
                        if (!comm.value) throw new java.lang.IllegalStateException("Comment is required for rejection")
                        change go_app value { 0 }; change go_rej value { 1 }
                        change status value { "Rejected - Needs Correction" }
                        changeCaseProperty("color").about { "orange" }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>order_dashboard</id>
        <x>784</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Order Dashboard</label>
        <icon>dashboard</icon>
        <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_dash</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Order and Invoices</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>status</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>manager_comment</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>linked_invoices</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
    </transition>

    <place><id>p_start</id><x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Draft</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_pending</id><x>304</x><y>208</y><label>Pending</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_dash</id><x>592</x><y>208</y><label>Dashboard State</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

    <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId><destinationId>submit</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>submit</sourceId><destinationId>p_pending</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pending</sourceId><destinationId>review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a4</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>review</sourceId><destinationId>p_dash</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_approve</reference></arc>
    <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>review</sourceId><destinationId>p_start</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_reject</reference>
        <breakpoint><x>400</x><y>368</y></breakpoint><breakpoint><x>112</x><y>368</y></breakpoint>
    </arc>
    <arc><id>a6</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_dash</sourceId><destinationId>order_dashboard</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```

```xml
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_wait</sourceId><destinationId>approve_invoice</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```
preco ma order dashboard prideleny system? ja chcem aby user videl stav orderu

Opravil som priradenie rolí. Úloha `order_dashboard` má teraz priradenú rolu `submitter`, aby ju používateľ (vlastník objednávky) videl vo svojom zozname úloh a mohol cez ňu sledovať stav a schvaľovať faktúry. Ponechal som `read` arc, aby úloha zostala trvalo otvorená a nezmizla po zobrazení. V procese **Invoice** som v akcii `setData` ponechal cieľ na túto úlohu, pretože slúži ako kontajner pre dáta.

```xml
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>sub_fin</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="2"><![CDATA[

                    change status value { "Pending Approval" }
                    changeCaseProperty("title").about { subject.value }

                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>

    <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>review</sourceId><destinationId>p_start</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_reject</reference>
        <breakpoint><x>400</x><y>368</y></breakpoint><breakpoint><x>112</x><y>368</y></breakpoint>
    </arc>
    <arc><id>a6</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_dash</sourceId><destinationId>order_dashboard</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```

### Invoice Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>invoice_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>INV</initials>
    <title>Invoice Registration</title>
    <icon>receipt</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

    <role><id>registrant</id><title>Registrant</title></role>
    <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

    <data type="text"><id>inv_number</id><title>Invoice Number</title></data>
    <data type="number"><id>amount</id><title>Amount</title></data>
    <data type="date"><id>inv_date</id><title>Invoice Date</title></data>
    <data type="file"><id>inv_file</id><title>Invoice File</title></data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>order_ref</id>
        <title>Select Order</title>
    </data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>inv_decision</id>
        <title>Invoice Decision</title>
        <options>
            <option key="approve">Approve</option>
            <option key="reject">Reject</option>
        </options>
    </data>

    <transition>
        <id>register</id>
        <x>208</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Register Invoice</label>
        <icon>add_circle</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <roleRef><id>registrant</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_reg</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_ref</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_number</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>amount</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_file</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="assign">
            <id>reg_ass</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="4"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    def orders = findCases { it.processIdentifier.eq(workspace + "order_process") }
                        .findAll { c -> (c.activePlaces?.get("p_dash") ?: 0) > 0 }
                        .collectEntries { [(it.stringId): it.title] }
                    change order_ref options { orders }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>reg_fin</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="5"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    async.run {
                        def parentCase = findCase { it._id.eq(order_ref.value) }
                        if (parentCase) {
                            def myTask = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("approve_invoice").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
                            if (myTask) {
                                def currentList = parentCase.dataSet?.get("linked_invoices")?.value ?: []
                                setData("order_dashboard", parentCase, [
                                    "linked_invoices": ["value": currentList + myTask.stringId, "type": "taskRef"]
                                ])
                            }
                        }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>approve_invoice</id>
        <x>592</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Approve Invoice</label>
        <icon>check_circle</icon>
        <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_inv_app</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Approval</title>
            <dataRef><id>inv_number</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>amount</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_file</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_decision</id><logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
    </transition>

    <place><id>p_start</id><x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_wait</id><x>400</x><y>208</y><label>Waiting</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

    <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId><destinationId>register</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>register</sourceId><destinationId>p_wait</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_wait</sourceId><destinationId>approve_invoice</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```
ten approve toho invoice ma kto robit? podla mna by mal byt ten task approve invoice nejaky manager

Upravil som priradenie rolí pre schvaľovanie faktúr. V procese **Invoice** som zmenil rolu pre úlohu `approve_invoice` zo `system` na `approver`. V procese **Order** som pridal akciu do `caseEvents`, ktorá pri vytvorení prípadu priradí rolu `approver` používateľovi, ktorý objednávku vytvoril (Order Owner). Tým sa zabezpečí, že vlastník objednávky uvidí a môže schvaľovať faktúry vložené do jeho dashboardu, zatiaľ čo ostatní používatelia ich neuvidia.

```xml
        <roleRef><id>registrant</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_reg</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_ref</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_number</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>amount</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>inv_file</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="assign">
            <id>reg_ass</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="4"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    def orders = findCases { it.processIdentifier.eq(workspace + "order_process") }
                        .findAll { c -> (c.activePlaces?.get("p_dash") ?: 0) > 0 }
                        .collectEntries { [(it.stringId): it.title] }
                    change order_ref options { orders }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>reg_fin</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="5"><![CDATA[
                    order_ref: f.order_ref;
                    async.run {
                        def parentCase = findCase { it._id.eq(order_ref.value) }
                        if (parentCase) {
                            def myTask = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("approve_invoice").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
                            if (myTask) {
                                def currentList = parentCase.dataSet?.get("linked_invoices")?.value ?: []
                                setData("order_dashboard", parentCase, [
                                    "linked_invoices": ["value": currentList + myTask.stringId, "type": "taskRef"]
                                ])
                            }
                        }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>approve_invoice</id>
        <x>592</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Approve Invoice</label>
        <icon>check_circle</icon>
        <roleRef><id>approver</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_inv_app</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Invoice Approval</title>
            <dataRef><id>inv_number</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>amount</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_file</id><logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
            <dataRef><id>inv_decision</id><logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic><layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout></dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
    </transition>

    <place><id>p_start</id><x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_wait</id><x>400</x><y>208</y><label>Waiting</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

    <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId><destinationId>register</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>register</sourceId><destinationId>p_wait</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_wait</sourceId><destinationId>approve_invoice</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```

The application consists of two separate processes: Order and Invoice.

Order process — internal, authenticated users only. A user creates an order by filling in a subject (required), supplier name (required), order date (required), and notes. After submission, a manager reviews and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. If rejected, the order loops back to the submitter for correction and resubmission. If approved, the order moves to an open state where it waits for invoices — this task must stay permanently open so invoices can be linked at any time. The order has a persistent status view showing current state, manager comment, and all linked invoices embedded inline via a taskRef panel.

Invoice process — internal, authenticated users only. A user registers an invoice by filling in invoice number (required), amount (required), invoice date (required), and uploading the invoice file (required). The invoice must be linked to an existing order — this is done via a caseRef or enumeration_map field dynamically populated with approved orders. After the invoice is registered, the order it belongs to is automatically notified: a system action in the invoice process finds the linked order case and sets a field on it to trigger a refresh of the embedded invoice panel. The invoice then waits for approval. The order owner reviews all linked invoices from within the order's permanent task and approves or rejects each one individually.

Both processes are completely independent namespaces — roles, fields and transitions must be declared separately in each process XML. Cross-process communication happens only through action code using findCase, setData, assignTask, and finishTask.

This application consists of two independent processes: **Order** and **Invoice**. The Order process manages the lifecycle of a purchase request, including a manager approval loop and a persistent "Open" state that embeds linked invoices. The Invoice process allows users to register bills against approved orders, using a system action to notify the parent Order case and refresh its embedded task list.

### Order Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>order_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>ORD</initials>
    <title>Order Process</title>
    <icon>shopping_cart</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

    <role><id>manager</id><title>Manager</title></role>
    <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

    <!-- Data Fields -->
    <data type="text">
        <id>subject</id>
        <title>Subject</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>supplier</id>
        <title>Supplier Name</title>
    </data>
    <data type="date">
        <id>order_date</id>
        <title>Order Date</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>notes</id>
        <title>Notes</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>status</id>
        <title>Current Status</title>
        <value>Draft</value>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <title>Manager Comment</title>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
    </data>
    <data type="enumeration_map">
        <id>decision</id>
        <title>Manager Decision</title>
        <options>
            <option key="approve">Approve</option>
            <option key="reject">Reject</option>
        </options>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_approve</id>
        <title>Go Approve</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="number">
        <id>go_reject</id>
        <title>Go Reject</title>
        <init>0</init>
    </data>
    <data type="taskRef">
        <id>linked_invoices</id>
        <title>Linked Invoices</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>refresh_trigger</id>
        <title>Refresh Trigger</title>
        <event type="set">
            <id>refresh_set</id>
            <actions phase="post">
                <action id="1"><![CDATA[
                    invoices: f.linked_invoices;
                    def tasks = findTasks { it.processIdentifier.eq(workspace + "invoice_process").and(it.transitionId.eq("invoice_approval")) }
                        .findAll { t -> 
                            def c = findCase { it._id.eq(t.caseId) }
                            return c?.getFieldValue("order_id") == useCase.stringId
                        }
                    change invoices value { tasks.collect { it.stringId } }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </data>

    <!-- Transitions -->
    <transition>
        <id>submit_order</id>
        <x>112</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Submit Order</label>
        <icon>send</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_submit</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Order Details</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>supplier</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>order_date</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>notes</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>submit_finish</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="2"><![CDATA[
                    status: f.status; change status value { "Pending Approval" }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </transition>

    <transition>
        <id>manager_review</id>
        <x>496</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Manager Review</label>
        <icon>rate_review</icon>
        <roleRef><id>manager</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_review</id>
            <cols>2</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Review Decision</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>subject</id>
                <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>decision</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols></layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>manager_comment</id>
                <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
                <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols></layout>
                <event type="set">
                    <id>comment_req</id>
                    <actions phase="post">
                        <action id="3"><![CDATA[
                            t_review: t.manager_review, decision: f.decision, comment: f.manager_comment;
                            if (decision.value == "reject") { make comment, required on t_review when { true } }
                            else { make comment, optional on t_review when { true } }
                        ]]></action>
                    </actions>
                </event>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
        <event type="finish">
            <id>review_finish</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="4"><![CDATA[
                    dec: f.decision, go_app: f.go_approve, go_rej: f.go_reject, status: f.status;
                    if (dec.value == "approve") {
                        change go_app value { 1 }; change go_rej value { 0 }
                        change status value { "Approved and Open" }
                    } else {
                        change go_app value { 0 }; change go_rej value { 1 }
                        change status value { "Rejected - Correction Required" }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>

    <transition>
        <id>ipc_refresh_target</id>
        <x>880</x>
        <y>16</y>
        <label>System Refresh Target</label>
        <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    </transition>

    <!-- Places and Arcs -->
    <place><id>p_start</id><x>112</x><y>304</y><label>Draft</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_review</id><x>304</x><y>208</y><label>Review</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
    <place><id>p_open</id><x>688</x><y>208</y><label>Open</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

    <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId><destinationId>submit_order</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>submit_order</sourceId><destinationId>p_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_review</sourceId><destinationId>manager_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    
    <!-- XOR Split -->
    <arc><id>a4</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_open</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_approve</reference></arc>
    <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_start</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_reject</reference>
        <breakpoint><x>496</x><y>400</y></breakpoint><breakpoint><x>112</x><y>400</y></breakpoint>
    </arc>

    <!-- Persistent Dashboard and IPC Target -->
    <arc><id>a6</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_open</sourceId><destinationId>order_dashboard</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
    <arc><id>a7</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_open</sourceId><destinationId>ipc_refresh_target</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
```

The application should be an internal email processing workflow for authenticated team members. In the first step, a user submits an incoming email by filling in the sender name (required), sender email address (required), subject (required), and the full email body (required, multiline). An optional file attachment can be included. After the user submits, a system task fires automatically without any human interaction: it sends the email subject and body to an external LLM API, which classifies the email into one of the following categories — Complaint, Inquiry, Order, Spam, Other — extracts key entities such as names, dates, and amounts as plain text, and generates a suggested response draft. The classification result, extracted entities, and response draft are stored automatically back into the case fields. In the final step, a reviewer opens the task and sees the original email alongside the AI-assigned category, extracted entities, and the suggested response draft. The reviewer can edit the draft if needed, select a final action (Reply, Forward, Archive, Escalate), and confirm to close the case. There is no public-facing view — this is an internal tool only. The API key for the LLM should be stored as a hidden field in the process.

This internal email processing workflow automates the initial triage of incoming messages using an LLM. It features a submission form, a system-driven AI analysis step that populates metadata and drafts, and a final human review stage for quality control and action selection.

```xml

    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>
    <role>
        <id>reviewer</id>
        <title>Reviewer</title>
    </role>
    <role>
        <id>system</id>
        <title>System</title>
    </role>
    <data type="text">
        <id>sender_name</id>
        <title>Sender Name</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>sender_email</id>
        <title>Sender Email Address</title>
    </data>
    <data type="text">
        <id>subject</id>

                    async.run {
                        def promptText = "Analyze this email. Subject: ${subject.value}. Body: ${email_body.value}. " +
                            "Return JSON with keys: 'category' (one of: complaint, inquiry, order, spam, other), " +
                            "'entities' (string listing names, dates, amounts), and 'draft' (a professional reply draft)."
                        
                        def conn = (java.net.HttpURLConnection) new java.net.URL("https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions").openConnection()
                        conn.setRequestMethod("POST")
                        conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "application/json")
                        conn.setRequestProperty("Authorization", "Bearer ${api_key.value}")
                        conn.setDoOutput(true)
                        conn.setConnectTimeout(15000)
                        conn.setReadTimeout(60000)
                        
                        def payload = [
                            model: "gpt-4o-mini",
                            messages: [[role: "user", content: promptText]],
                            response_format: [type: "json_object"]
                        ]
                        conn.outputStream.write(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(payload).getBytes("UTF-8"))
                        
                        def responseBody = ""
                        try { responseBody = conn.inputStream.getText("UTF-8") }
                        catch (e) { responseBody = conn.errorStream?.getText("UTF-8") ?: '{"error":"unreachable"}' }
                        
                        def json = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper().parseText(responseBody)
                        def content = json?.choices?.getAt(0)?.message?.content ?: "{}"
                        def data = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper().parseText(content)
                        
                        def tReview = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("review_email").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
                        if (tReview) {

                                extracted_entities: [value: data.entities ?: "None found", type: "text"],
                                response_draft: [value: data.draft ?: "", type: "text"]
                            ])
                        }
                    }
                    ]]>
```

The application should be an internal HR workflow for authenticated employees and managers. An employee submits a leave request by filling in the leave type (required — dropdown: Annual Leave, Sick Leave, Personal Leave), start date (required), end date (required), a reason, and an optional file attachment such as a medical certificate. After submission, the employee's direct manager reviews the request and either approves or rejects it — a comment is mandatory in both cases. If the manager rejects the request, the employee receives an email notification and the request loops back so they can correct and resubmit. If the manager approves, the request moves to an HR officer for final approval. The HR officer verifies the leave balance and either confirms or rejects — rejection also loops back to the employee with an email. Once HR approves, the employee receives an email confirmation with the approved dates. At all times the employee should have a persistent status view showing the current stage of their request and any comments left by the manager or HR.

This workflow is an internal HR leave request process for authenticated employees and managers. Employees submit leave requests, which are reviewed by their manager (approve/reject with comment), and then by HR (approve/reject with comment). Rejections at any stage loop back to the employee for correction, with email notifications. The employee always has access to a persistent status view showing the current stage and all comments.

The application should consist of two separate but linked processes: a List process and an Item process. The List process contains a single permanently open task with a taskRef panel and an Add button. When the user clicks Add, a new Item case is created automatically and its task is immediately embedded as an inline editable panel inside the List task — the user can fill in the item fields directly without navigating away. Each click of Add creates one more Item case and adds its task panel to the list. The Item process is a simple form with a name (required), a description, and a numeric value field. The item task uses the system role so it can be embedded and kept alive inside the List taskRef panel. The List process must be internal — authenticated users only. There is no approval step, no routing, and no end state — the list stays permanently open so items can be added and edited at any time.

This application consists of two linked processes: a **List** process that acts as a persistent dashboard and an **Item** process that serves as the data entry form for individual entries. The List process uses a read-arc pattern to keep a single task permanently open, while the Item process uses the `system` role to allow its tasks to be embedded as editable panels within the List via a `taskRef` field.

### List Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>list_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>LST</initials>
    <title>Item Management List</title>
    <icon>list_alt</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>
    <role>
        <id>system</id>
        <title>System</title>
    </role>
    <data type="taskRef">
        <id>item_tasks</id>
        <title>Items</title>
    </data>
    <data type="button">
        <id>add_item</id>
        <title/>
        <placeholder>Add New Item</placeholder>
        <init>1</init>
        <event type="set">
            <id>add_item_set</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="1"><![CDATA[
                    item_tasks: f.item_tasks;
                    def newItem = createCase(workspace + "item_process", "New Item", "blue")
                    def tid = newItem.tasks.find { it.transition == "item_form" }?.task
                    if (tid) {
                        change item_tasks value { (item_tasks.value ?: []) + tid }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </data>
    <transition>
        <id>dashboard</id>
        <x>304</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Manage Items</label>
        <icon>dashboard</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>

            <id>dg_list</id>
```

The application should be an internal bug tracking workflow for authenticated software development teams. A reporter submits a bug by filling in a title (required), a description of the problem (required), steps to reproduce (required), a severity level (required — dropdown: Critical, High, Medium, Low), the affected component, and an optional screenshot attachment. After submission, a triage team member reviews the report, sets the internal priority, writes triage notes, and assigns the bug to the correct developer using a user selector field. The assigned developer works on the fix, writes a description of the changes made (required), and marks the bug as ready for verification. A QA engineer then verifies the fix — if verification passes, the bug is marked as resolved and the original reporter receives an email notification. If the QA engineer rejects the fix, they must provide mandatory rejection feedback and the bug loops back to the developer for rework. This rework loop can repeat any number of times until QA accepts the fix. At all times the reporter should have a persistent status view showing the current state of their bug report and, once resolved, a summary of what was fixed.

This workflow implements an internal bug tracking system for authenticated teams. It includes roles for Reporter, Triage, Developer, and QA. The process collects all required bug details, routes the report through triage (where priority and assignment are set), then to the assigned developer, and on to QA for verification. If QA rejects the fix, the process loops back to the developer for rework, repeating as needed. The reporter always has a persistent status view, and receives an email when the bug is resolved.

```xml
              if (qa_decision.value == "reject") {
                make qa_feedback, editable on t_qa when { true }
                make qa_feedback, required on t_qa when { true }
              } else {
                make qa_feedback, hidden on t_qa when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>
          </actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>

        <id>qa_feedback</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>

          } else {
            change status value { "Rework Required" }
          }

          }
        ]]></action>
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            async.run { assignTask("status_view"); }
          } else {
            async.run { assignTask("dev_fix"); }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>

    <reference>qa_reject_flag</reference>
  </arc>
  <!-- Read arc for persistent status view -->
  <arc>
    <id>a11</id>
    <type>read</type>
    <sourceId>p_status</sourceId>
    <destinationId>status_view</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <!-- After submission, always enable status view -->
  <arc>
    <id>a12</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>submit_bug</sourceId>
    <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <!-- After QA accept, always enable status view -->
  <arc>
    <id>a13</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>status_view</sourceId>
    <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <!-- Routing flags for QA decision -->
  <data type="number">
    <id>qa_accept_flag</id>
    <title>QA Accept Flag</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>qa_reject_flag</id>
    <title>QA Reject Flag</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <transition>
    <id>qa_decision_router</id>
    <x>880</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>QA Router</label>
    <icon>call_split</icon>
    <roleRef>
      <id>system</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <!-- No dataGroup -->
    <event type="assign">
      <id>qa_router_assign</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="12"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision, qa_accept_flag: f.qa_accept_flag, qa_reject_flag: f.qa_reject_flag;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            change qa_accept_flag value { 1 };
            change qa_reject_flag value { 0 };
          } else {
            change qa_accept_flag value { 0 };
            change qa_reject_flag value { 1 };
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
    <event type="assign">
      <id>qa_router_assign_post</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="13"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            def t = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("qa_decision_router").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
            if (t) finishTask(t)
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <arc>
    <id>a14</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>p_qa</sourceId>
    <destinationId>qa_decision_router</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
</document>
```

The application should be an internal procurement workflow for authenticated employees. A submitter fills in a purchase order form with vendor name (required), amount (required), category (required — dropdown with options: Software, Hardware, Services, Other), business justification (required), a detailed description, and an optional supporting document attachment. After submission, the PO is sent simultaneously to both the Legal department and the Finance department for parallel review — both reviews must be completed before the process can continue. The Legal reviewer checks contractual compliance and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. The Finance reviewer checks budget availability and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. If either reviewer rejects, the submitter is notified by email with the rejection reason and the request loops back so they can revise and resubmit. Once both Legal and Finance have approved, the Procurement Manager receives a task showing both review outcomes and makes the final decision to issue or reject the PO. If issued, the submitter receives an email confirmation. Throughout the process the submitter should have a persistent status view showing current state, reviewer comments, and the final outcome.

A parallel-review procurement workflow where AND-split feeds Legal and Finance simultaneously, an AND-join system bridge checks both decisions and either loops the submitter back for revision (with email notification) or advances to the Procurement Manager for final issuance. A permanently alive status task on a read arc gives the submitter a persistent view of state, reviewer comments, and outcome throughout.
