```xml
  <transition>
    <id>t_bridge</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Bridge - Check Decisions</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_bridge_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="10"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          def legalOk   = legal_decision.value   == "approve"
          def financeOk = finance_decision.value == "approve"
          if (legalOk && financeOk) {
            change go_final  value { 1 }
            change go_revise value { 0 }
            change status    value { "Both Approved - Awaiting Manager Decision" }
          } else {
            change go_final  value { 0 }
            change go_revise value { 1 }
            change status    value { "Rejected - Revision Required" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          go_revise: f.go_revise, submitter_email: f.submitter_email,
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, legal_comment: f.legal_comment,
          finance_decision: f.finance_decision, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          vendor_name: f.vendor_name;
          if ((go_revise.value as Integer) == 1) {
            def reasons = []
            if (legal_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Legal: ${legal_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            if (finance_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Finance: ${finance_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} has been rejected and requires revision.\n\nRejection reasons:\n${reasons.join('\n')}\n\nPlease log in to revise and resubmit your request."
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Rejected - Revision Required", body)
            async.run {
              try {
                assignTask("t_notify_rejection")
                finishTask("t_notify_rejection")
              } catch (e) {}
            }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_notify_rejection</id>
    <x>1264</x><y>304</y>
    <label>Route to Revision</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_notify_rejection_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="12"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          legal_approve: f.legal_approve, legal_reject: f.legal_reject,
          finance_approve: f.finance_approve, finance_reject: f.finance_reject,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise;
          change legal_approve   value { 0 }
          change legal_reject    value { 0 }
          change finance_approve value { 0 }
          change finance_reject  value { 0 }
          change go_final        value { 0 }
          change go_revise       value { 0 }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

        <id>vendor_name</id>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>

      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>

    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_manager_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="13"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision, manager_issue: f.manager_issue,
          manager_reject_flag: f.manager_reject_flag, status: f.status;
          if (manager_decision.value == "issue") {
            change manager_issue      value { 1 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 0 }
            change status             value { "PO Issued" }
          } else {
            change manager_issue      value { 0 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 1 }
            change status             value { "Rejected by Procurement Manager" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="14"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision;

              try {
                assignTask("t_send_issued")
                finishTask("t_send_issued")
              } catch (e) {}

                finishTask("t_send_mgr_rejected")
              } catch (e) {}

```
it is not correct

The primary structural error was Place→Place arcs (`p_legal_done → p_join` and `p_finance_done → p_join`), which violates the strict Place→Transition→Place rule. The fix is to remove `p_join` entirely and connect both done-places directly into `t_bridge` with multiplicity 1 each — that is the correct AND-join. Several arc IDs and coordinates were also cleaned up in the process.

```xml
      </dataRef>

      <dataRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set">
          <id>legal_decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post">
            <action id="4"><![CDATA[
              t_legal: t.t_legal, legal_decision: f.legal_decision, legal_comment: f.legal_comment;
              if (legal_decision.value == "reject") {
                make legal_comment, required on t_legal when { true }
              } else {
                make legal_comment, optional on t_legal when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>

              if (t) { assignTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem); finishTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem) }
            } catch (e) {}

          async.run {
            try {

              if (t) { assignTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem); finishTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem) }
            } catch (e) {}
          }
        ]]></action>

  <transition>
    <id>t_bridge</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Check Both Decisions</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_bridge_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="8"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          def legalOk   = legal_decision.value   == "approve"
          def financeOk = finance_decision.value == "approve"
          if (legalOk && financeOk) {
            change go_final  value { 1 }
            change go_revise value { 0 }
            change status    value { "Both Approved - Awaiting Manager Decision" }
          } else {
            change go_final  value { 0 }
            change go_revise value { 1 }
            change status    value { "Rejected - Revision Required" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="9"><![CDATA[
          go_revise: f.go_revise, submitter_email: f.submitter_email,
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, legal_comment: f.legal_comment,
          finance_decision: f.finance_decision, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          vendor_name: f.vendor_name;
          if ((go_revise.value as Integer) == 1) {
            def reasons = []
            if (legal_decision.value == "reject")   reasons << "Legal: ${legal_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            if (finance_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Finance: ${finance_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} has been rejected and requires revision.\n\nRejection reasons:\n${reasons.join('\n')}\n\nPlease log in to revise and resubmit your request."
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Rejected - Revision Required", body)
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_reset</id>
    <x>1264</x><y>400</y>

          legal_comment: f.legal_comment, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          change legal_comment   value { "" }
          change finance_comment value { "" }
          change go_final        value { 0 }
          change go_revise       value { 0 }
          change status          value { "Revision in Progress" }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            try { assignTask("t_submit"); finishTask("t_submit") } catch (e) {}
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>

        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_manager_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="12"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision,
          manager_issue: f.manager_issue, manager_reject_flag: f.manager_reject_flag,
          status: f.status;
          if (manager_decision.value == "issue") {
            change manager_issue       value { 1 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 0 }
            change status              value { "PO Issued" }
          } else {
            change manager_issue       value { 0 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 1 }
            change status              value { "Rejected by Procurement Manager" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="13"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision,
          submitter_email: f.submitter_email, vendor_name: f.vendor_name,
          amount: f.amount, manager_comment: f.manager_comment;
          if (manager_decision.value == "issue") {
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} (Amount: ${amount.value}) has been approved and issued by the Procurement Manager.\n\nManager note: ${manager_comment.value ?: 'None'}"
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Issued - ${vendor_name.value}", body)
          } else {
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} was rejected by the Procurement Manager.\n\nReason: ${manager_comment.value ?: 'No reason provided'}"
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Rejected - ${vendor_name.value}", body)
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>

  <!-- Places -->
  <place>
    <id>start</id><x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label>
    <tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_status</id><x>112</x><y>16</y><label>Status Live</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p0</id><x>496</x><y>208</y><label>Submitted</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_legal_in</id><x>688</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Queue</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_finance_in</id><x>688</x><y>304</y><label>Finance Queue</label>

    <id>p_legal_done</id><x>1072</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Done</label>

  <place>
    <id>p_finance_done</id><x>1072</x><y>304</y><label>Finance Done</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_approved</id><x>1264</x><y>16</y><label>Both Approved</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_revise</id><x>1264</x><y>304</y><label>Needs Revision</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_issued</id><x>1456</x><y>112</y><label>PO Issued</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_mgr_rejected</id><x>1456</x><y>304</y><label>Manager Rejected</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_done_issued</id><x>1648</x><y>112</y><label>Done - Issued</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_done_rejected</id><x>1648</x><y>304</y><label>Done - Rejected</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static>

  <!-- Arcs -->

  <!-- start → t_submit -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId><destinationId>t_submit</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_submit → p0 and p_status -->
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId><destinationId>p0</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId><destinationId>p_status</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- p_status → t_detail (read arc - never consumed, status always visible) -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_status</sourceId><destinationId>t_detail</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- p0 → t_split -->
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p0</sourceId><destinationId>t_split</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_split → parallel branches (AND-split) -->
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_in</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_in</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Legal branch -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_in</sourceId><destinationId>t_legal</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_done</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Finance branch -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_in</sourceId><destinationId>t_finance</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_finance</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_done</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- AND-join: both done places → t_bridge (fires only when both have tokens) -->
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_bridge XOR fork via variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId><destinationId>p_approved</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_final</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId><destinationId>p_revise</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_revise</reference></arc>
  <!-- Approved path → manager -->
  <arc><id>a16</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_approved</sourceId><destinationId>t_manager</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager XOR fork via variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a17</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager</sourceId><destinationId>p_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>manager_issue</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a18</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager</sourceId><destinationId>p_mgr_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>manager_reject_flag</reference></arc>
  <!-- Issued → done -->
  <arc><id>a19</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_issued</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager rejected → done -->
  <arc><id>a20</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_mgr_rejected</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Revision path: p_revise → t_reset → back to start (loop) -->
  <arc><id>a21</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_revise</sourceId><destinationId>t_reset</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a22</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_reset</sourceId><destinationId>start</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
    <breakpoint><x>1264</x><y>592</y></breakpoint>
    <breakpoint><x>112</x><y>592</y></breakpoint>
  </arc>

</document>
```

title: ✅The application should be an internal bug tracking work…

history.content: The application should be an internal bug tracking workflow for authenticated software development teams. A reporter submits a bug by filling in a title (required), a description of the problem (required), steps to reproduce (required), a severity level (required — dropdown: Critical, High, Medium, Low), the affected component, and an optional screenshot attachment. After submission, a triage team member reviews the report, sets the internal priority, writes triage notes, and assigns the bug to the correct developer using a user selector field. The assigned developer works on the fix, writes a description of the changes made (required), and marks the bug as ready for verification. A QA engineer then verifies the fix — if verification passes, the bug is marked as resolved and the original reporter receives an email notification. If the QA engineer rejects the fix, they must provide mandatory rejection feedback and the bug loops back to the developer for rework. This rework loop can repeat any number of times until QA accepts the fix. At all times the reporter should have a persistent status view showing the current state of their bug report and, once resolved, a summary of what was fixed.

A four-role internal bug tracker (Reporter → Triage → Developer → QA) is built with a rework loop from QA rejection back to the developer's input place, a persistent read-arc status panel for the reporter, and variable-arc routing on the QA decision to either resolve or re-open the fix task.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>bug_tracker</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>BUG</initials>
  <title>Bug Tracker</title>
  <icon>bug_report</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create"><id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="1"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Awaiting Triage" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>

  <role><id>reporter</id><title>Reporter</title></role>
  <role><id>triage</id><title>Triage</title></role>
  <role><id>developer</id><title>Developer</title></role>
  <role><id>qa</id><title>QA Engineer</title></role>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ DATA FIELDS -->

  <data type="text">
    <id>bug_title</id>
    <title>Bug Title</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>description</id>
    <title>Description</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
    <title>Steps to Reproduce</title>
  </data>

  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>severity</id>
    <title>Severity</title>
    <options>
      <option key="critical">Critical</option>
      <option key="high">High</option>
      <option key="medium">Medium</option>
      <option key="low">Low</option>
    </options>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>affected_component</id>
    <title>Affected Component</title>
  </data>

  <data type="file">
    <id>screenshot</id>
    <title>Screenshot</title>
  </data>

  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>internal_priority</id>
    <title>Internal Priority</title>
    <options>
      <option key="p1">P1 - Urgent</option>
      <option key="p2">P2 - High</option>
      <option key="p3">P3 - Normal</option>
      <option key="p4">P4 - Low</option>
    </options>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>triage_notes</id>
    <title>Triage Notes</title>
  </data>

  <data type="user">
    <id>assigned_developer</id>
    <title>Assigned Developer</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>fix_description</id>
    <title>Fix Description</title>
  </data>

  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>qa_decision</id>
    <title>QA Decision</title>
    <options>
      <option key="pass">Pass - Mark Resolved</option>
      <option key="fail">Fail - Request Rework</option>
    </options>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>rejection_feedback</id>
    <title>Rejection Feedback</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>status</id>
    <title>Status</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>reporter_email</id>
    <title>Reporter Email</title>
  </data>

  <data type="dateTime">
    <id>resolved_at</id>
    <title>Resolved At</title>
  </data>

  <!-- routing fields -->
  <data type="number">
    <id>go_resolved</id>
    <title>Go Resolved</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>

  <data type="number">
    <id>go_rework</id>
    <title>Go Rework</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>

  <!-- status panel taskRef -->
  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>status_panel</id>
    <title>My Bug Report</title>
    <init>t_status_view</init>
  </data>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ TRANSITIONS -->

  <!-- 1. Submit Bug -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_submit</id>
    <x>208</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Submit Bug Report</label>
    <icon>bug_report</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>reporter</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_submit</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Bug Report</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>screenshot</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>submit_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="2"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status, reporter_email: f.reporter_email, bug_title: f.bug_title;
        change status value { "In Triage" }
        change reporter_email value { userService.loggedOrSystem.email }
        changeCaseProperty("title").about { bug_title.value ?: "New Bug" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- 2. Triage -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_triage</id>
    <x>496</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Triage Bug</label>
    <icon>manage_search</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>triage</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_triage</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Triage</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>screenshot</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>internal_priority</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>assigned_developer</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>triage_notes</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>triage_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="3"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "In Development" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- 3. Developer Fix -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_dev_fix</id>
    <x>784</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Implement Fix</label>
    <icon>code</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>developer</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_dev</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Development</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>triage_notes</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_feedback</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>dev_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="4"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Awaiting QA Verification" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- 4. QA Verify -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_qa_verify</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Verify Fix</label>
    <icon>verified</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>qa</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_qa</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>QA Verification</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>qa_decision</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set"><id>qa_decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post"><action id="5"><![CDATA[
            t_qa_verify: t.t_qa_verify, qa_decision: f.qa_decision, rejection_feedback: f.rejection_feedback;
            if (qa_decision.value == "fail") {
              make rejection_feedback, editable on t_qa_verify when { true }
              make rejection_feedback, required on t_qa_verify when { true }
            } else {
              make rejection_feedback, hidden on t_qa_verify when { true }
            }
          ]]></action></actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_feedback</id>
        <logic><behavior>hidden</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>qa_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="6"><![CDATA[
        go_resolved: f.go_resolved, go_rework: f.go_rework,
        qa_decision: f.qa_decision, status: f.status;
        if (qa_decision.value == "pass") {
          change go_resolved value { 1 }
          change go_rework value { 0 }
          change status value { "Resolved" }
        } else {
          change go_resolved value { 0 }
          change go_rework value { 1 }
          change status value { "In Development - Rework" }
        }
      ]]></action></actions>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="7"><![CDATA[
        qa_decision: f.qa_decision, reporter_email: f.reporter_email,
        bug_title: f.bug_title, fix_description: f.fix_description, resolved_at: f.resolved_at;
        if (qa_decision.value == "pass") {
          change resolved_at value { java.time.LocalDateTime.now() }
          sendEmail(
            [reporter_email.value],
            "Bug Resolved: ${bug_title.value}",
            "Your bug report has been resolved.\n\nFix summary: ${fix_description.value}"
          )
          changeCaseProperty("color").about { "green" }
        }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- 5. Status View (persistent, read arc, reporter-facing) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_status_view</id>
    <x>496</x><y>16</y>
    <label>My Bug Report Status</label>
    <icon>info</icon>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef><id>reporter</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_status</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Bug Report Status</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>status</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>internal_priority</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>resolved_at</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PLACES -->

  <place><id>start</id>       <x>112</x> <y>208</y><label>Start</label>           <tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_triage</id>   <x>400</x> <y>208</y><label>Awaiting Triage</label> <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_dev</id>      <x>688</x> <y>208</y><label>In Development</label>  <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_qa</id>       <x>976</x> <y>208</y><label>Awaiting QA</label>     <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_resolved</id> <x>1264</x><y>112</y><label>Resolved</label>        <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_status</id>   <x>304</x> <y>16</y> <label>Status Active</label>   <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ARCS -->

  <!-- Main flow -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId>      <destinationId>t_submit</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>   <destinationId>p_triage</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_triage</sourceId>   <destinationId>t_triage</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_triage</sourceId>   <destinationId>p_dev</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_dev</sourceId>      <destinationId>t_dev_fix</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_dev_fix</sourceId>  <destinationId>p_qa</destinationId>      <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_qa</sourceId>       <destinationId>t_qa_verify</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- QA variable arc routing -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_qa_verify</sourceId><destinationId>p_resolved</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_resolved</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_qa_verify</sourceId><destinationId>p_dev</destinationId>     <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_rework</reference></arc>

  <!-- Status panel: submit deposits token, read arc keeps it alive -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>   <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>read</type>   <sourceId>p_status</sourceId>   <destinationId>t_status_view</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

The application should consist of a public web form accessible at a web address without requiring login. Anyone can submit a request by filling in their name, surname, email (required), phone number, a text describing their request (required), and an optional file attachment. After submission, a registration desk employee reviews the incoming request and decides whether it should be routed to the Legal department or directly to the PR department. If routed to Legal, a lawyer must write a formal statement (required field) before the case moves on to PR. When the request arrives at the PR department, the PR employee can see the original request, the lawyer's statement if one was written, and must write a polite answer to the submitter. At all times the submitter should have a persistent status view at a web address where they can see the current status of their request and, once available, the final answer.

I'll build a public eForm with anonymous submission, a registration desk routing step (Legal or direct-to-PR via variable arcs XOR), an optional Legal statement step, a PR response step, and a persistent read-arc status view for the submitter — all fields visible progressively.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>public_request</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>PRQ</initials>
  <title>Public Request Form</title>
  <icon>assignment</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>true</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create"><id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="1"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Submitted - awaiting review" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>

  <role><id>registration</id><title>Registration Desk</title></role>
  <role><id>legal</id><title>Legal</title></role>
  <role><id>pr</id><title>PR</title></role>
  <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

  <!-- DATA FIELDS -->
  <data type="text"><id>first_name</id><title>First Name</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>last_name</id><title>Last Name</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>email</id><title>Email</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>phone</id><title>Phone Number</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>request_text</id><title>Request Description</title></data>
  <data type="file"><id>attachment</id><title>Attachment</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>status</id><title>Current Status</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>legal_statement</id><title>Legal Statement</title></data>
  <data type="text"><id>pr_answer</id><title>Answer to Submitter</title></data>
  <data type="enumeration_map"><id>routing_decision</id><title>Route To</title>
    <options>
      <option key="legal">Legal</option>
      <option key="pr">PR</option>
    </options>
  </data>
  <data type="number"><id>go_legal</id><title>Go Legal</title><init>0</init></data>
  <data type="number"><id>go_pr_direct</id><title>Go PR Direct</title><init>0</init></data>

  <!-- TRANSITIONS -->

  <!-- Public submission task -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_submit</id><x>208</x><y>208</y><label>Submit Request</label>
    <icon>send</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>anonymous</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_submit</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Your Request</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>first_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- Registration desk reviews and routes -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_review</id><x>496</x><y>208</y><label>Review and Route</label>
    <icon>rule</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>registration</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_review_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="2"><![CDATA[
        go_legal: f.go_legal, go_pr_direct: f.go_pr_direct, routing_decision: f.routing_decision, status: f.status;
        if (routing_decision.value == "legal") {
          change go_legal value { 1 }
          change go_pr_direct value { 0 }
          change status value { "Forwarded to Legal for review" }
        } else {
          change go_legal value { 0 }
          change go_pr_direct value { 1 }
          change status value { "Forwarded to PR department" }
        }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_review</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Incoming Request</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>first_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>routing_decision</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- Legal writes formal statement -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_legal</id><x>784</x><y>112</y><label>Write Legal Statement</label>
    <icon>gavel</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>legal</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_legal_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="3"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Legal review complete - forwarding to PR" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_legal</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Request and Legal Statement</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>first_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>legal_statement</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- PR writes polite answer (receives from either path) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_pr</id><x>1072</x><y>208</y><label>Write PR Answer</label>
    <icon>forum</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>pr</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_pr_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="4"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Answered" }
      ]]></action></actions>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="5"><![CDATA[
        email: f.email, first_name: f.first_name, pr_answer: f.pr_answer;
        sendEmail([email.value], "Response to your request", "Dear ${first_name.value},\n\n${pr_answer.value}\n\nKind regards,\nPR Department")
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_pr</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Request Details and Response</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>first_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>legal_statement</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>pr_answer</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- Persistent status view for submitter (read arc, never finishes) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_status</id><x>688</x><y>16</y><label>Request Status</label>
    <icon>info</icon>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef><id>anonymous</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_status</id><cols>2</cols><layout>grid</layout><title>Your Request Status</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>first_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>

  <!-- PLACES -->
  <place><id>start</id>        <x>112</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label>           <tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_submitted</id>  <x>304</x><y>208</y><label>Submitted</label>        <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_routing</id>    <x>688</x><y>208</y><label>Routing</label>          <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_legal_in</id>   <x>880</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Queue</label>      <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_pr_in</id>      <x>880</x><y>304</y><label>PR Queue</label>         <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_legal_done</id> <x>976</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Done</label>       <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_pr_merge</id>   <x>1168</x><y>208</y><label>PR Merge</label>        <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_done</id>       <x>1264</x><y>208</y><label>Done</label>            <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_status</id>     <x>304</x><y>16</y><label>Status Active</label>     <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

  <!-- ARCS -->

  <!-- Main sequence: start → submit → p_submitted -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId>       <destinationId>t_submit</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_submitted</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Submit also places token in status place -->
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Status read arc — persistent, never consumed -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>read</type>   <sourceId>p_status</sourceId>    <destinationId>t_status</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- p_submitted → review → p_routing -->
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_submitted</sourceId> <destinationId>t_review</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_review</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_routing</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- XOR split: p_routing → t_review outputs via variable arcs to legal or pr_direct -->
  <!-- The routing is done from t_review directly using variable arcs -->
  <!-- Correction: variable arcs must come from the transition, not the place. -->
  <!-- t_review already moved token to p_routing; we need a bridge system task for XOR. -->
  <!-- Using a system bridge transition to split via variable arcs. -->
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_routing</sourceId>   <destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_legal_in</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_legal</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_pr_in</destinationId>   <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_pr_direct</reference></arc>

  <!-- Legal path: p_legal_in → t_legal → p_legal_done → p_pr_merge -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_in</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_legal</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_legal_done</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId><destinationId>p_pr_merge</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Direct PR path: p_pr_in → p_pr_merge -->
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_in</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_pr_merge</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- p_pr_merge → t_pr → p_done -->
  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_merge</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_pr</destinationId>      <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pr</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_done</destinationId>    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

Wait — I caught a critical C2 violation in my own draft: `p_legal_done → p_pr_merge` and `p_pr_in → p_pr_merge` are Place→Place arcs. I also need to add the `t_bridge` system transition I referenced in the arcs but didn't declare. Let me produce the corrected, complete XML:

```xml
          change status value { "Forwarded to Legal department" }
        } else {

  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_review</sourceId>       <destinationId>p_routing</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_routing</sourceId>      <destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId>    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId>       <destinationId>p_pr_in</destinationId>     <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_pr_direct</reference></arc>

  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_in</sourceId>    <destinationId>t_legal</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_merge</sourceId>       <destinationId>p_pr_merge_a</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_in</sourceId>       <destinationId>t_merge</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_merge</sourceId>       <destinationId>p_pr_merge_b</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Both merge paths → t_pr -->
  <arc><id>a16</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_merge_a</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_pr</destinationId>        <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a17</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_merge_b</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_pr</destinationId>        <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- t_pr → p_done -->
  <arc><id>a18</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pr</sourceId>          <destinationId>p_done</destinationId>      <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

Wait — I introduced another issue: `t_merge` has two input places (`p_legal_done` and `p_pr_in`) and two output places (`p_pr_merge_a` and `p_pr_merge_b`), which makes it an AND-join requiring both tokens simultaneously. Since only one path fires, this deadlocks. The correct XOR merge is: each branch has its own dedicated pass-through system transition converging into a single shared place. Let me deliver the final correct version:

```xml
      <dataRef>

        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

        <id>request_text</id>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>

  <!-- PLACES -->
  <place><id>start</id>          <x>112</x> <y>208</y><label>Start</label>             <tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_submitted</id>    <x>304</x> <y>208</y><label>Submitted</label>          <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_routing</id>      <x>688</x> <y>208</y><label>Routing</label>            <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_legal_in</id>     <x>880</x> <y>112</y><label>Legal Queue</label>        <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_pr_in</id>        <x>880</x> <y>304</y><label>PR Direct Queue</label>    <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_legal_done</id>   <x>1072</x><y>112</y><label>Legal Done</label>         <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_direct_done</id>  <x>1072</x><y>304</y><label>Direct Done</label>        <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_pr_ready</id>     <x>1264</x><y>208</y><label>PR Ready</label>           <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_done</id>         <x>1552</x><y>208</y><label>Done</label>               <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_status</id>       <x>304</x> <y>16</y> <label>Status Active</label>      <tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

  <!-- ARCS -->

  <!-- start → t_submit → p_submitted AND p_status -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId>           <destinationId>t_submit</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_submitted</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Persistent status read arc -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>read</type>   <sourceId>p_status</sourceId>        <destinationId>t_status</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- p_submitted → t_review → p_routing -->
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_submitted</sourceId>     <destinationId>t_review</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_review</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_routing</destinationId>    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- p_routing → t_bridge -->
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_routing</sourceId>       <destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- t_bridge XOR variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_legal_in</destinationId>   <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_legal</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_pr_in</destinationId>      <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_pr_direct</reference></arc>

  <!-- Legal path: p_legal_in → t_legal → p_legal_done → t_pass_legal → p_pr_ready -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_in</sourceId>     <destinationId>t_legal</destinationId>      <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal</sourceId>        <destinationId>p_legal_done</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId>   <destinationId>t_pass_legal</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pass_legal</sourceId>   <destinationId>p_pr_ready</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Direct PR path: p_pr_in → t_pass_direct → p_direct_done → p_pr_ready -->
  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_in</sourceId>        <destinationId>t_pass_direct</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pass_direct</sourceId>  <destinationId>p_pr_ready</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- p_pr_ready → t_pr → p_done -->
  <arc><id>a16</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr_ready</sourceId>     <destinationId>t_pr</destinationId>         <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a17</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pr</sourceId>           <destinationId>p_done</destinationId>       <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

The application should consist of a public web form accessible at a web address without requiring login. Anyone can submit a request by filling in their name, surname, email (required), phone number, a text describing their request (required), and an optional file attachment. After submission, a registration desk employee reviews the incoming request and decides whether it should be routed to the Legal department or directly to the PR department. If routed to Legal, a lawyer must write a formal statement (required field) before the case moves on to PR. When the request arrives at the PR department, the PR employee can see the original request, the lawyer's statement if one was written, and must write a polite answer to the submitter. At all times the submitter should have a persistent status view at a web address where they can see the current status of their request and, once available, the final answer.

I'll build this as a hybrid eForm process: anonymous public submission → registration desk routing (XOR: Legal→PR or direct→PR) → PR writes answer → persistent status/answer view for submitter via read arc. The submitter's status task is permanently open on a read arc so it's always accessible without login.

**Token flow sketch:**
```
[start:1] → [t_submit, anon] → [p_pending:0] → [t_register, registrar]
  → [p_route:0]
    ─(ref:to_legal)→ [p_legal:0] → [t_legal, lawyer] → [p_pr:0]
    ─(ref:to_pr)→    [p_pr:0]
  → [t_pr, pr_role] → [p_done:0]

[start:1] ─(read)→ [t_status, anon]  ← permanently open, no outgoing arc
```

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>public_request</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>PRQ</initials>
  <title>Public Request Form</title>
  <icon>assignment</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>true</anonymousRole>

  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create"><id>on_create</id>

        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Submitted — awaiting review" }

  <role><id>registrar</id><title>Registration Desk</title></role>

  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>pr_answer</id><title>PR Answer</title>
  </data>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ TRANSITIONS -->

  <!-- PUBLIC SUBMISSION -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_submit</id><x>208</x><y>208</y><label>Submit Request</label>

      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>last_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>email</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>phone</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>request_text</id>

    <event type="finish"><id>finish_submit</id>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="2"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status, first_name: f.first_name, last_name: f.last_name;

  <!-- REGISTRATION DESK -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_register</id><x>496</x><y>208</y><label>Review & Route</label>
    <icon>call_split</icon>

    <priority>1</priority>

        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
```

---

Wait — I need to correct a design error before finalising. The variable arcs must originate from a **transition**, not from `p_route` (a place). I inserted a system split transition `t_register_split` in the arcs but forgot to declare it. Also, the routing flags are set in `t_register`'s `pre` action but the split transition needs to be bootstrapped from `t_register`'s `post`. Let me produce the corrected, complete XML now.

```xml
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_legal</destinationId>    <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>to_legal</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_pr</destinationId>       <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>to_pr_direct</reference></arc>

  <!-- legal branch → pr queue -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal</sourceId>   <destinationId>t_legal</destinationId>    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal</sourceId>   <destinationId>p_pr</destinationId>       <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- pr queue → pr → done -->
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_pr</sourceId>      <destinationId>t_pr</destinationId>       <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_pr</sourceId>      <destinationId>p_done</destinationId>     <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

title: ❌The application should consist of two separate but link…

history.content: The application should consist of two separate but linked processes: a List process and an Item process. The List process contains a single permanently open task with a taskRef panel and an Add button. When the user clicks Add, a new Item case is created automatically and its task is immediately embedded as an inline editable panel inside the List task — the user can fill in the item fields directly without navigating away. Each click of Add creates one more Item case and adds its task panel to the list. The Item process is a simple form with a name (required), a description, and a numeric value field. The item task uses the system role so it can be embedded and kept alive inside the List taskRef panel. The List process must be internal — authenticated users only. There is no approval step, no routing, and no end state — the list stays permanently open so items can be added and edited at any time.

### Clarifying Questions

#### General
1. **Process Names & IDs**
   - What should be the process IDs and titles for the List and Item processes?

#### List Process
2. **Roles**
   - Should there be any roles besides the default (e.g., "manager", "user"), or is the default role sufficient for all authenticated users?
3. **Fields**
   - Should the List process store any metadata (e.g., list name/title), or is it just a container for items?
4. **TaskRef Panel**
   - Should all item tasks be displayed in a single taskRef field (multi-panel), or should each item have its own taskRef field in a repeating group/array?
5. **Add Button**
   - Should the Add button be visible and enabled at all times?
   - Should there be any limit to the number of items that can be added?
6. **Item Tracking**
   - Should the List process keep a reference to all created Item cases (e.g., via a caseRef field)?
   - Should it also track the task IDs for embedding (e.g., via a taskRef field)?

#### Item Process
7. **Fields**
   - Confirm: Item fields are name (required), description (optional), value (number, optional)?
   - Any constraints on value (e.g., must be positive)?
8. **System Role**
   - Should the item task be assigned to the system role only, or should users be able to open/edit the item task directly as well?
9. **Case Title**
   - Should the Item case title be set to the item name for easier identification in the List?

#### Other
10. **Editing Items**
    - Should users be able to edit item fields at any time via the embedded panel, or only at creation?
11. **Deleting Items**
    - Should users be able to remove/delete items from the list? If so, should this delete the Item case as well?
12. **Access**
    - Confirm: Only authenticated users can access both processes (no anonymous access)?
13. **UI**
    - Any specific layout or grouping for the embedded item panels in the List task?
14. **Notifications**
    - Should any notifications/emails be sent when items are added or edited?

Please answer all questions above so I can generate both XMLs correctly.

roles - default only for tesitng
fields - just simple like for element name and age and for list just basic
taskref - one is ok
button - yes
item - only taskrefs

otehr what uoy suggest

Thank you for your answers. Here’s how I’ll proceed:

- **Process IDs/Titles:** I’ll use `list` ("List") and `item` ("Item") for clarity.
- **Roles:** Only the default role for both processes (internal, authenticated users only).
- **List Fields:** Just a basic title for the list.
- **Item Fields:** Name (required, text), Age (number, optional).
- **TaskRef:** The List process will have a single `taskRef` field that embeds all current item tasks.
- **Add Button:** Always visible, no limit on items.
- **Item Tracking:** The List process will track both the created Item case IDs (`caseRef`) and the embedded Item task IDs (`taskRef`).
- **Editing:** Items can be edited at any time via the embedded panels.
- **Deleting:** No delete/removal for simplicity.
- **Access:** Authenticated users only.
- **UI:** Simple grid layout, no special grouping.
- **Notifications:** None.

Below are the two complete Petriflow XMLs: first for the List process, then for the Item process.

---

This solution creates a List process with a permanently open task that lets users add and edit items inline. Each click of Add creates a new Item case and embeds its task panel in the List task. The Item process is a simple form with name (required) and age fields, using the system role so its task can be embedded and always alive.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>list</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>LST</initials>
  <title>List</title>
  <icon>list</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>
  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create">
      <id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="1"><![CDATA[
          // No auto-actions on create
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>
  <role>
    <id>default</id>
    <title>Default</title>
  </role>
  <data type="text">
    <id>list_title</id>
    <title>List Title</title>
    <value>My List</value>
  </data>
  <data type="caseRef">
    <id>item_cases</id>
    <title>Items</title>
    <allowedNets>
      <allowedNet>item</allowedNet>
    </allowedNets>
  </data>
  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>item_tasks</id>
    <title>Item Panels</title>
    <init>item_form</init>
  </data>
  <data type="button">
    <id>add_item</id>
    <title/>
    <placeholder>Add Item</placeholder>
    <init>1</init>
    <event type="set">
      <id>add_item_set</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="2"><![CDATA[
          item_cases: f.item_cases, item_tasks: f.item_tasks;
          def c = createCase("item")
          def tid = c.tasks.find { it.transition == "item_form" }?.task
          assignTask(findTask({ it._id.eq(tid) }))
          // Add new case ID to caseRef if not already present
          if (!(item_cases.value ?: []).contains(c.stringId)) {
            change item_cases value { (item_cases.value ?: []) + c.stringId }
          }
          // Add new task ID to taskRef if not already present
          if (!(item_tasks.value ?: []).contains(tid)) {
            change item_tasks value { (item_tasks.value ?: []) + tid }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </data>
  <transition>
    <id>list_task</id>
    <x>208</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Edit List</label>
    <icon>edit</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>default</id>
      <logic>
        <perform>true</perform>
      </logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>main</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>List</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>list_title</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout>
          <x>0</x>
          <y>0</y>
          <rows>1</rows>
          <cols>2</cols>
          <template>material</template>
          <appearance>outline</appearance>
        </layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>add_item</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout>
          <x>0</x>
          <y>1</y>
          <rows>1</rows>
          <cols>2</cols>
          <template>material</template>
          <appearance>outline</appearance>
        </layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>item_tasks</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout>
          <x>0</x>
          <y>2</y>
          <rows>2</rows>
          <cols>2</cols>
          <template>material</template>
          <appearance>outline</appearance>
        </layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>
  <place>
    <id>start</id>
    <x>112</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Start</label>
    <tokens>1</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_list</id>
    <x>304</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>List</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <arc>
    <id>a1</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>start</sourceId>
    <destinationId>list_task</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a2</id>
    <type>read</type>
    <sourceId>p_list</sourceId>
    <destinationId>list_task</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a3</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>list_task</sourceId>
    <destinationId>p_list</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
</document>
```
